# Prasad Gade

> Data Scientist and Computer Engineer from Mumbai, India. B.Tech student at SPIT (CGPA 9.26/10). Builds data pipelines, ML models, dashboards, and interactive web apps.

This is Prasad Gade's personal portfolio at prasadgade.dev. It is a single-page React app with 4 visual themes, a 3D Minecraft skin viewer, a paper physics playground, hidden easter eggs, and in-app keyboard shortcuts with nested in-tab navigation.

Keyboard shortcuts are available in-app. Press ? to open the shortcut guide. Use 1 to 9 and 0 for tabs, Arrow keys to move through interactive items inside the active tab, Home/End to jump within that tab, Enter to trigger the focused action, Space to make the focused Minecraft viewer jump, R for resume, T for themes even while help/movies/resume/Minecraft modals are open, and Esc to close overlays.

- Email: prasadgade4405@gmail.com

## Blogs

Prasad writes a personal blog at prasadgade.dev. All written content is 100% human-written. Thumbnails are AI-generated.

- Blog listing: https://prasadgade.dev/?tab=blogs
- Blog metadata (JSON): https://prasadgade.dev/blogs/blogs.json
- RSS feed: https://prasadgade.dev/blogs/rss.xml
